Seychelles Sectors

  • The Seychelles airspace is divided into the following sectors:

Seychelles FSS

  • centered on PRA VOR, 200 NM and beyond
Position Callsign Frequency CPDLC Remarks
FSSS_FSS Seychelles Control 132.900 FSSF -
Airspace Class Owner Limits Remarks
Seychelles FIR G FSSS_FSS GND - FL75 -
Seychelles FIR E FSSS_FSS FL75 - FL145 -
Seychelles FIR A FSSS_FSS FL145 - UNLTD -

Seychelles FIR

  • centered on PRA VOR, up to 200 NM
Position Callsign Frequency CPDLC Remarks
FSSS_CTR Seychelles Control 120.200 FSSSS -
Airspace Class Owner Limits Remarks
Seychelles FIR A FSSS_CTR FL145 - UNLTD -

FSSS Seychelles | v0.1
